title: Do you offer nonprofit discounts on monthly plans?
excerpt: At this time we are unable to offer discounts to monthly plans.

posts.author: lrosalanko (Lauren Rosalanko)
posts.cookedHtml: At this time we are unable to offer discounts to monthly plans.

posts.author: Emil (Emil)
posts.cookedHtml:
Are you sure you didn’t mean to write “unwilling” instead of “unable”?

… Be honest

posts.author: lrosalanko (Lauren Rosalanko)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Emil!

Great question - it is a limitation with our billing processor. If you are interested in our nonprofit discounts or have more questions about a plan we’d be happy to help support you on a yearly plan. You can submit answers to our form to see if you are eligible here: Nonprofits | monday.com.

Warmly,
Lauren
